artwork/illustration/1_space.jpg.title: Adventure in Space
artwork/illustration/1_space.jpg.description: A story about a girl who takes off with her alien friend and robot pet dog to explore the universe.

artwork/illustration/2_cave.jpg.title: Alibaba Enters the Cave
artwork/illustration/2_cave.jpg.description: An illustration of Alibaba entering the hidden cave after the bandits left. Part of a Visual Development project meant for either children books or animation.

artwork/illustration/3_elephant.jpg.title: The Elephant in The Room
artwork/illustration/3_elephant.jpg.description: An illustration of the elephant in the room (literally). An editorial illustration.

artwork/illustration/4_newyear.jpg.title: New Year Fireworks
artwork/illustration/4_newyear.jpg.description: An illustration celebrating the New year, with cats enjoying the fireworks!

artwork/illustration/5_wonderland.jpg.title: Alice in Wonderland
artwork/illustration/5_wonderland.jpg.description: An illustration of Alice meeting the Cheshire cat.

artwork/illustration/6_jellyfish1.JPG.title: Jellyfish Evolution 1
artwork/illustration/6_jellyfish1.JPG.description: The first part of a sequential illustration project. This part shows an ordinary looking Jellyfish.

artwork/illustration/7_jellyfish2.jpg.title: Jellyfish Evolution 2
artwork/illustration/7_jellyfish2.jpg.description: The second part of a sequential illustration project. This part shows a Jellyfish that evolved and now has a head, arms, and a torso.

artwork/illustration/8_arrival.JPG.title: Arrival in the land of Freedom (Cover)
artwork/illustration/8_arrival.JPG.description: The cover of a biographical sequential project. The project is about my family's journey to the US during Covid closures.

artwork/illustration/9_arrival1.JPG.title: Arrival in the land of Freedom (Page 1)
artwork/illustration/9_arrival1.JPG.description: Part 1 of a biographical sequential project about my family's journey to the US during Covid closures. This part shows the beginning of the story, in which we're offloading our luggage to enter the airport.

artwork/illustration/10_arrival2.JPG.title: Arrival in the land of Freedom (Page 2)
artwork/illustration/10_arrival2.JPG.description: Part 2 of a biographical sequential project about my family's journey to the US during Covid closures. This part shows the lowest point of the story, in which we were rejected in transit and sent back without our luggage.

artwork/illustration/11_arrival3.JPG.title: Arrival in the land of Freedom (Page 3)
artwork/illustration/11_arrival3.JPG.description: Part 3 of a biographical sequential project about my family's journey to the US during Covid closures. This part shows the end of the story, in which we're celebrating our arrival to the US after all the struggles we've been through.

artwork/visual-development/1_alibaba.jpg.title: Alibaba Character Sheet
artwork/visual-development/1_alibaba.jpg.description: Alibaba's character sheet, including a turnaround, expressions, and an action pose. Part of the Alibaba Visual Development project meant for either children books or animation.

artwork/visual-development/4_baba.jpg.description: Baba Mustapha's turnaround. Part of the Alibaba Visual Development project meant for either children books or animation.

artwork/visual-development/5_son.jpg.title: Alibaba's Son Character Sheet

artwork/visual-development/8_snake.JPG.title: Mot's Den
artwork/visual-development/8_snake.JPG.description: A background design illustration of Mot's throne room in the underground realm. Part of the Baal project.

artwork/visual-development/9_alibabastre.title: Murjana Witnessing The Exchange
artwork/visual-development/9_alibabastre.description: An illustration of Murjana witnessing Baba Mustapha snitching on them to Hassan in exchange for gold. Part of a Visual Development project meant for either children books or animation.

artwork/visual-development/10_monsterrun.title: Monster Runway
artwork/visual-development/10_monsterrun.description: A Frankenstein character illustration project. No specific story for this one, but the concept is based on a mix of Frankenstein with a criticism of plastic surgeries.

artwork/visual-development/11_mot.JPG.title: Mot
artwork/visual-development/11_mot.JPG.description: A character illustration of the Ugaritic God of death Mot. Part of the Baal project.

artwork/visual-development/12_baal.JPG.title: Baal
artwork/visual-development/12_baal.JPG.description: A character illustration of the Ugaritic God Baal. Part of the Baal project.

artwork/graphic-design/1_product.png.description: Samples of vinyl stickers and keychains I made for sale during Geek Con (Syracuse University's comic convention).
